headline: Both chambers in light duty post-Fourth recess, reconvening Thursday in brief pro forma sessions.

senate.lastSessionSummary: The Senate met in pro forma session on Monday, July 6 at 9:01 a.m. and adjourned within seconds until Thursday. No substantive business was conducted, as Congress remained in its Independence Day recess period.

house.lastSessionSummary: The House met briefly on Monday, July 6 at 10:30 a.m. and adjourned at 10:32 a.m. Eleven bills and two resolutions were introduced, including H.R. 8481 on victim protections and H.J. Res. 1 proposing a constitutional amendment on Supreme Court size. No votes were taken.

onTheFloor.title: Amend federal law to provide natural lifetime injunctions for certain victims
Proposed constitutional amendment to fix the Supreme Court at nine justices
